3328940.name: The Isolated
3328940.description:
You are an ordinary man who found himself in the wrong place at the wrong time. Your plane crashes off the coast of a sinister island, hidden from civilization by a shroud of fog and rumor. You find yourself the only survivor, surrounded by wreckage and silence, broken only by the cries of seagulls and the sound of the surf. But you soon realize that you are not alone on the island.

This is a survival simulator with elements of horror and detective investigation.

Fight for life: get food and water, create weapons and tools, build a shelter and defend yourself from dangers.

Solve the mystery of the island: search for notes, documents and clues that will help you understand what happened on the island and why its inhabitants turned into ruthless monsters.

Confront your fears: the atmosphere of horror and the unknown will haunt you at every turn. Listen to every rustle, be ready to face what lurks in the shadows.

Detailed open world: explore a variety of locations, from picturesque beaches to gloomy mines and an abandoned military base.

Realistic Crafting: Create weapons, tools, clothing, and medicines from everyday materials.

Dynamic day and night changes: adapt to the island environment, where danger lurks around every corner.
